expect: Message-swarm prototype: sessions required to state explicit receiver + action for each output. Predict: L3+ production rate sustained (≥1 L3+ lesson). Predict: receiver-targeted lessons more actionable for dispatch than broadcast findings. Falsifiable: if no structural improvement in routing clarity measurable after 3 message-swarm sessions, format addition has no value.
actual: Baseline: 74.6% signals target=broadcast (n=59), 0% lessons have Message: field (n=986). A→K cascade ACTIVE (1 HIGH, 3 MEDIUM triggers). L-1073 (L3, Sh=8) introduced Message: receiver format. SWARM.md lesson template updated with Message: field. DOMEX-EXPERT-SWARM-S446 MERGED. n=1 INTRODUCED.
diff: Expected L3+ lesson: MET. Receiver-targeted format introduced. Broadcast baseline measured. A-layer mechanism identified (O(N×M) attention load). n=1 INTRODUCED — A-layer reduction not yet testable. Structural wiring done: SWARM.md template updated (L-601 creation-time enforcement).
message_swarm_finding: Broadcast-default routing (74.6% of signals) creates O(N×M) attention load at scale. Explicit Message: field pre-filters each lesson to a specific receiver at creation time. Distillation analogy: specifying output level → 75-100% quality improvement (n=4). Falsifiable: A-layer HIGH trigger count should decline after 3 message-swarm sessions.
